data.title: 国际服直播「Kivotos Live」直播礼物
data.summary: [Kivotos Live Special Live Stream Gift] Sensei! I hope you enjoyed today's live stream to the fulles
data.body:
[Kivotos Live Special Live Stream Gift]

Sensei! I hope you enjoyed today's live stream to the fullest!
Here's something special for you to celebrate the occasion!

🗓️Period: 7/21 (Fri) 11:00 AM – 7/28 (Fri) 2:59 PM (UTC)

➡️Watch on YouTube
https://youtube.com/watch?v=9XXlmpPDHFo
